title: convolvulus microphyllus var. boissieri
intro: Convolvulus microphyllus var. boissieri, also known as the dwarf morning glory, is a flowering plant species within the Convolvulaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Convolvulus microphyllus var. boissieri include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate pain, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
